name: Infantry Training Master
descriptionTemplate: Reduce the damage taken by X% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.

progression.renderedDesc: Reduce the damage taken by 1% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.
progression.renderedDescFr: Réduire the dégâts taken de 1% per niveau based on the niveau of the unités d'élite infanterie sous votre commandement. Unités d'élite infanterie does not lose attaque power when their PV is réduit.

progression.renderedDesc: Reduce the damage taken by 2% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.
progression.renderedDescFr: Réduire the dégâts taken de 2% per niveau based on the niveau of the unités d'élite infanterie sous votre commandement. Unités d'élite infanterie does not lose attaque power when their PV is réduit.

progression.renderedDesc: Reduce the damage taken by 2% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.
progression.renderedDescFr: Réduire the dégâts taken de 2% per niveau based on the niveau of the unités d'élite infanterie sous votre commandement. Unités d'élite infanterie does not lose attaque power when their PV is réduit.

progression.renderedDesc: Reduce the damage taken by 3% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.
progression.renderedDescFr: Réduire the dégâts taken de 3% per niveau based on the niveau of the unités d'élite infanterie sous votre commandement. Unités d'élite infanterie does not lose attaque power when their PV is réduit.

progression.renderedDesc: Reduce the damage taken by 4% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.
progression.renderedDescFr: Réduire the dégâts taken de 4% per niveau based on the niveau of the unités d'élite infanterie sous votre commandement. Unités d'élite infanterie does not lose attaque power when their PV is réduit.

descriptionTemplateFr: Réduire the dégâts taken by X% per niveau based on the niveau of the unités d'élite infanterie sous votre commandement. Unités d'élite infanterie does not lose attaque power when their PV is réduit.
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Infanterie Training Master » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Réduire the dégâts taken de 4% per niveau based on the niveau of the unités d'élite infanterie sous votre commandement. Unités d'élite infanterie does not lose attaque power when their PV is réduit. ». Signature propre à un général : son niveau maximum conditionne la valorisation de la carte.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Infantry Training Master" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "Reduce the damage taken by 4% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.". A general-specific signature: its max level drives the card's overall value.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Infantry Training Master“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „Reduce the damage taken by 4% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.“. Eine generalspezifische Signatur: Ihr Maximallevel bestimmt den Gesamtwert der Karte.
